article_title: Regenerative Agriculture Market Projected to Reach $37 Billion by 2035 as Federal Funding and New Research Accelerate Adoption

content_preview.title: Regenerative Agriculture Market Projected to Reach $37 Billion by 2035 as Federal Funding and New Research Accelerate Adoption
content_preview.summary: The global regenerative agriculture market is projected to grow from $9.83 billion to $37.44 billion by 2035, fueled by USDA funding, corporate commitments, and new soil carbon research.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The global regenerative agriculture market is on track to nearly quadruple over the next decade, according to a [market analysis published by SNS Insider on April 6 via GlobeNewsWire](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/04/06/3268518/0/en/Regenerative-Agriculture-Market-Size-to-Grow-37-44-Billion-by-2035-SNS-Insider.html). The report values the sector at $9.83 billion in 2025 and projects it will reach $37.44 billion by 2035, representing a compound annual growth rate of...

editor_notes.content_quality: Good agriculture market analysis with federal funding and research context.
editor_notes.source_verification: GlobeNewsWire, USDA, and Nature/Scientific Reports — all authoritative.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Market data and USDA program details from official sources.
